title: The Allies Push Forward
description: Spandam continues dragging Robin toward the Gate of Justice while CP9 and the guards try to hold back the rescue.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Enies Lobby guard, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Blueno. Spandam continues dragging Robin toward the Gate of Justice while CP9 and the guards try to hold back the rescue.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Uooo ooo!! Hey, hey!!! wait, that's....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Shit!! Don't get them near me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: SHIT!!! Don't get them near me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What're you getting so excited about,

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: A greedy idiot will destroy himself.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: However, I will say one thing.

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: even I am not aware of it....!!

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: -Tower of Justice, Rob Rob Lucci's room-

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: It wasn't in my picture encyclopedia, either.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Shut up!! Think about it, you two!!

summary: Spandam continues dragging Robin toward the Gate of Justice while CP9 and the guards try to hold back the rescue.
